title: malus baccata var. jinxianensis
intro: Malus baccata var. jinxianensis, also known as Jinxian crabapple, is a variety of the Malus baccata species, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its fruit and bark, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Malus baccata var. jinxianensis include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which may help to prevent or alleviate conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making tea from its bark and fruit, as well as using it in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote digestive health and boost the immune system.
